name: Curry Roasted Cauliflower

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Put the cauliflower in a large bowl and add the oil. Use your hands to toss
Add the curry powder and salt and toss thoroughly to coat.
Spread the cauliflower onto a rimmed baking sheet in a single layer, bake
for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the cauliflower is crisp-tender and well
